patch:
--- a/comparator.sv
+++ b/comparator.sv
@@ -12,10 +12,10 @@ module comparator_wrapper (
   output equal_flag
 );
   comparator cmp_inst (
-    .data_a(input_a[7:0]),
+    .data_a(input_a[7:0]),
     .data_b(input_b[7:0]),
-    .is_greater(equal_flag),
-    .is_equal(greater_flag)
+    .is_greater(greater_flag),
+    .is_equal(equal_flag)
   );
